instrument_pair: Short GC future plus long GLD
hedge_or_position: Spot cancels under a nearly perfect hedge
risk_or_failure: If risk is perfectly canceled, only risk-free return remains
lecture_control: Excess Sharpe should be zero after funding cost

strategy: Crude roll via energy equity hedge
hedge_or_position: Contango: short USO and long XLE; backwardation: reverse
risk_or_failure: Crisis alpha can be followed by a long momentum crash
lecture_control: Add regime exit, short-leg control, or mean-reversion overlay

signal: Annualized roll approximated by (VIX index - VX future) / T
hedge_or_position: Short VX in deep contango, long VX in backwardation; same-side ES hedge
risk_or_failure: VIX index is not directly tradable and ES/VIX relation is regime-dependent
lecture_control: Fit hedge ratio on the selected regime and convert contract multipliers

signal: Positive autocorrelation between L-day lookback return and H-day forward return
hedge_or_position: Buy if lookback return is positive, short if negative, hold H days
risk_or_failure: Overlapping windows make p-values too optimistic
lecture_control: Sample every min(L,H) days and keep p-value below 0.05

signal: Slow positive trend plus shorter-term pullback
hedge_or_position: Trade only when slow momentum and fast mean-reversion agree
risk_or_failure: Pure momentum can whipsaw in a sharp crash and recovery
lecture_control: Combine signals to stay flat through the crash regime

instrument_pair: Two expiries on the same futures curve
signal: Curve curvature, not just curve slope
hedge_or_position: Use front/back spread so spot exposure is largely hedged
risk_or_failure: A linear curve gives the same roll to both legs and no spread edge
lecture_control: Trade only when curvature is stable enough for the spread sign

instrument_pair: 3x ETF and underlying index near the close
signal: Daily leverage reset creates same-direction close-flow after a large move
hedge_or_position: Anticipate forced buying after up days and forced selling after down days
risk_or_failure: 3x ETF long-run growth is not 3x index growth because variance scales by 9x
lecture_control: Separate volatility drag math from rebalance-flow trading signal
